import{MessageEvent}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer';import{TokensStoreParser}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/parser/TokenStoreParser';export class TokensStoreEvent extends MessageEvent{constructor(callBack){super(callBack,TokensStoreParser);}getParser(){return this.parser;}}// Bridge to your React view (DiamondsStoreView listens to "store_tokens_shop")
export const tokensStoreEventCallback=event=>{const parser=event.getParser();window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('store_tokens_shop',{detail:{diamonds:parser.diamonds,items:parser.items}}));};
